neck.title: neck
neck.blurb: The 7th meeting point: the locus where polarity inverts. The shared apex of all three double-cones — the setpoint 0, the bound, the flux, the frame. Generative negative space, not a normal point.

face.title: face
face.blurb: A typed surface — the wide mouth of one cone, the outer tip of a double-cone. Its normal is a volumetric axis, not a line. Six faces = six tips of three bicones.

bicone.title: double-cone
bicone.blurb: One axis (region / flow / reach) read as two cones meeting tip-to-tip at the neck. The negative cone-field, the neck, the positive cone-field. State resolves in the cone's surface/volume, not on the spine.

edge.title: chiral seam
edge.blurb: A boundary between two faces, drawn as a torus ring. Ingress is not the inverse of egress: same seam, different crossing, different consequence.

corner.title: triad
corner.blurb: A triadic junction where three typed surfaces meet — one landmark drawn from each of the three axes. Eight corners, each a distinct (region, flow, reach) triple.
